name_cn:
Goyard Vendôme Shell Bag TM
Inheriting the brand's unique craftsmanship and exquisite techniques: detachable shoulder strap, embedded wooden details, leather corners, large zipper, yellow lining, and its unique shell shape. More modern and refined, showcasing a woman's softness and lightness. Can be worn over the shoulder or carried by hand 👇🏻👇🏻
11 colors available: Black, Brown, Red, Burgundy, Yellow, Green, Grey, White, Sky Blue, and Navy Blue. 🌈
Size: 23cm (L) x 18.5cm (H) x 10cm (W)
020205
